repository_role: HELIX umbrella architecture and coordination registry

resolution_rules.current_default_branch_head: Resolve from live GitHub metadata. Embedded commit SHAs are historical observations and must not be treated as the current head after later commits or merges.
resolution_rules.open_pull_requests: Resolve from live GitHub metadata. Do not maintain a supposedly canonical embedded open-PR list that becomes stale when this file is committed.
resolution_rules.temporary_write_authority: A temporary write claim is valid only for its named repository branch, declared paths, and open pull request. It expires automatically when that pull request closes or merges.
resolution_rules.current_ci_review_and_merge_gate: Resolve from live GitHub workflow, review, pull-request and approval metadata for the exact current head. Do not embed a current pass, pending or approval state as canonical project truth.
source_precedence: live GitHub repository, pull-request, review and CI metadata
ChatGPT project instructions and conversation memory
resolution_rules.completed_increment_history: Completed increments are historical evidence, not an exhaustive or current ledger. Resolve the latest merged pull request, current default-branch head, CI, reviews and merge state from live GitHub.
resolution_rules.workstream_entries: Workstream entries are bounded claim declarations, not proof that authority is currently active. A claim is active only while live GitHub shows an open pull request for the exact declared branch; it expires automatically when that pull request closes or merges and does not require a follow-up commit merely to mark expiry.

trusted_baseline.observation_semantics: Historical observation of main immediately after HELIX30000 PR #7 merged. Live GitHub determines the current head and latest completed increment after later commits or merges.

completed_increments.title: Add HELIX conversation-role registry v0.1
completed_increments.governance_exception: PR #1 merged after exact-head CI but before the required independent coordination review was completed.

completed_increments.title: Reconcile registry after PR1 merge
completed_increments.governance_exception: PR #2 merged after exact-head CI and after its owner-identity review findings were addressed, but without an independent review from a separate GitHub identity.

completed_increments.title: Make post-merge reconciliation non-self-referential
completed_increments.governance_exception: PR #3 merged after exact-head CI and owner-side read-only review, but without a submitted review from a separate GitHub identity.

completed_increments.title: Register HELIX persistence workspace and charter v0.1
completed_increments.governance_exception: PR #4 merged after exact-head CI but without a requested or submitted independent review from a separate GitHub identity.

completed_increments.title: Reconcile persistence charter merge state
completed_increments.governance_exception: PR #6 merged after exact-head CI and owner-side technical review, but without a submitted review from a separate GitHub identity.

completed_increments.title: Reconcile PR 6 merge state
completed_increments.governance_exception: PR #7 merged after exact-head CI but before its pull-request number was bound into .project and without a submitted technical or independent review.

post_merge_branch_commit.semantics: This commit was written to the source branch after PR #7 had already merged. It is not part of main, carries no continuing write authority, and must not be promoted as accepted project state.

workstreams.write_owner: HELIX — Coordination and Reality Control conversation
workstreams.objective: Record PR #7 as merged, preserve its review and merge-gate exception, classify the post-merge branch commit as unaccepted, and make workstream and completed-increment state explicitly live-resolved so coordination merges do not create an endless reconciliation loop.
workstreams.status_resolution: Do not infer active authority from this file. Resolve whether this branch has an open pull request, its exact head, CI, reviews and merge state from live GitHub.
workstreams.authority_expiry_condition: This temporary one-file claim is active only while a live open pull request exists for this exact branch and expires automatically when it closes or merges.
verification_criteria: the exact pull-request diff contains only .project/active-work.json
PR #7 is recorded as merged at 34875c15bed3e6947f834df29b8810d0e718e86d
PR #7 exact-head CI run 29978416555 is recorded as successful
PR #7 is recorded with zero submitted reviews and its premature merge gate exception remains visible
post-merge branch commit bc732fa08b1f432d65398f6ca0f76ad47ee377bc is classified as not merged and superseded
workstream entries no longer assert current authority or require embedded pull-request numbers
completed increment history is explicitly historical and non-exhaustive
all HELIX deployment and operational-verification claims remain false
no runtime, workflow, registry, test, charter, credential, database, cloud or external-repository file changes
workstreams.next_gate: Open one draft pull request from this branch, obtain exact-head CI and a final read-only one-file scope review, and keep merge as a separate explicit decision. Do not add a pull-request-number binding commit.

pull_request_state_resolution.pull_request_identifier_semantics: A pull-request number may be reported in review evidence but is not embedded as current canonical state. Resolve open, closed, merged, head, CI, review and approval state live.

next_bounded_candidate.safe_scope: Create a dedicated repository only after explicit approval, then begin with documentation, machine-readable entity and transition contracts, integrity rules, failure and replay requirements, query requirements, and validation tests without database deployment.
prohibited_without_new_authorization: legacy HelixMemoryService code or data import

authority_boundary.helix30000_control_tower: coordination-only outside an explicitly declared temporary workstream; stable role does not grant repository-write authority
authority_boundary.persistence_workspace: merged design authority only; no dedicated implementation repository or branch authority exists
authority_boundary.future_persistence_repository: not created and no repository authority exists
authority_boundary.helix_memory_service: read-only legacy prototype evidence; not canonical HELIX persistence and not imported
authority_boundary.protocol_kernel: read-only contract dependency; no external repository writes
authority_boundary.contextos: read-only boundary dependency; no external repository writes
authority_boundary.service_tracer: read-only evidence source; no external repository writes

workstream_semantics.activation_rule: active only while live GitHub shows an open pull request whose head branch exactly matches the declared branch
workstream_semantics.expiry_rule: authority expires automatically when the matching pull request closes or merges
